tasks.task: Install Handlebars library Install handlebars: npm install handlebars Install handlebars types: npm install --save-dev @types/handlebars

Create TemplateService Create src/modules/mail/services/template.service.ts Configure Handlebars instance Implement template compilation with cache (Map<string, HandlebarsTemplateDelegate>) Implement render(templateName: string, data: object): Promise<string> method Load template file from src/modules/mail/templates/ directory Compile template (cache if not already compiled) Render template with data → return HTML string Error handling: Template not found, compilation errors

Add template support to MailService Inject TemplateService into MailService Implement sendTemplateEmail(to, subject, templateName, data): Promise<void> method Call TemplateService.render(templateName, data) → get HTML Call MailService.sendEmail(to, subject, html) with rendered HTML Error handling: Template rendering failures wrapped
Register TemplateService in MailModule Add TemplateService to MailModule providers Export TemplateService (if needed by other modules)

Testing Unit test TemplateService.render() (mock file system, test template compilation, test caching) Unit test TemplateService.render() error handling (template not found, invalid template syntax) Unit test MailService.sendTemplateEmail() (mock TemplateService, mock IEmailProvider, test delegation) Integration test template rendering (test real template files with sample data) Integration test MailService.sendTemplateEmail() end-to-end (template → render → send email)

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Template files oluşturulmuş (src/modules/mail/templates/ klasörü) - Template files: verification.hbs, password-reset.hbs, welcome.hbs - Template variables: {{firstName}}, {{verificationLink}}, {{resetLink}}, etc.

TemplateService oluşturulmuş (src/modules/mail/services/template.service.ts) - render(templateName: string, data: object): Promise<string> method - Handlebars configured ve compile ediliyor - Template compile ve cache (performance optimization) - Template path: src/modules/mail/templates/

MailService template support eklendi - sendTemplateEmail(to: string, subject: string, templateName: string, data: object): Promise<void> method - Template rendering via TemplateService - Delegates to MailService.sendEmail() with rendered HTML content

docs.doc: Email Templates (Handlebars) story specifications, AC-5.3.1 through AC-5.3.3, TemplateService design, template compilation caching strategy
Epic-level story breakdown, template files and variables specification
Error handling pattern: Template not found → NotFoundException, compilation errors → BadRequestException, i18n support
Testing standards: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, unit test coverage requirements, integration test approach
Mail module structure established, error handling pattern, MailService implementation, MailModule structure

artifact.reason: MailService.sendEmail() method to be extended with sendTemplateEmail() method

code.artifact: Provider-agnostic email service with sendEmail() method. Will be extended with sendTemplateEmail() that uses TemplateService for rendering.

artifact.reason: MailModule providers array needs TemplateService added

code.artifact: Mail module definition with dynamic provider injection. TemplateService needs to be added to providers array.

artifact.reason: Email provider interface - MailService uses this for email sending

code.artifact: IEmailProvider interface with send() method. MailService delegates to this interface for email sending.

artifact.reason: SendGrid provider implementation - MailService uses this via IEmailProvider interface

code.artifact: SendGrid provider implementation. MailService uses this through IEmailProvider interface for actual email sending.

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Template engine for email templates - needs to be installed
TypeScript types for Handlebars - dev dependency
NestJS framework - Injectable decorator, Logger, exceptions

constraints.constraint: Template Engine Pattern: Handlebars template engine for email content, template compilation with caching for performance (compile once, render many times)
Service Layer Pattern: TemplateService for template rendering (single responsibility), MailService for email sending orchestration (uses TemplateService)
Performance Optimization: Template compilation cached in memory (Map<string, HandlebarsTemplateDelegate>), first render compiles and caches, subsequent renders use cached template
Error Handling Pattern: Template not found → NotFoundException with i18n message, compilation errors → BadRequestException, rendering errors → wrap and log, throw BadRequestException
Template Variable Naming: Use camelCase for template variables ({{firstName}}, {{verificationLink}}, {{resetLink}}), consistent naming across all templates
Module Structure: Template files in src/modules/mail/templates/, TemplateService in src/modules/mail/services/template.service.ts, clear separation between template rendering and email sending

Testing Requirements: Unit tests for TemplateService.render() (mock file system, test compilation, test caching), unit tests for MailService.sendTemplateEmail() (mock TemplateService, mock IEmailProvider), integration tests for template rendering and email sending
Coding Standards: Follow NestJS module structure pattern, use Injectable decorator, use Logger for error logging, use i18n for error messages, follow Arrange-Act-Assert test pattern

interface.name: IEmailProvider
interface.signature: send(to: string, subject: string, html: string, text?: string): Promise<EmailResult>

interfaces.interface: Email provider interface used by MailService for email sending. TemplateService renders HTML, MailService calls IEmailProvider.send() with rendered HTML.

interface.name: MailService.sendEmail
interface.signature: sendEmail(to: string, subject: string, html: string, text?: string): Promise<void>

interfaces.interface: Existing MailService method that sends email via IEmailProvider. sendTemplateEmail() will call TemplateService.render() then delegate to this method.

tests.standards: Testing follows Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Unit tests use mocks for dependencies (file system, TemplateService, IEmailProvider). Integration tests use real template files and test end-to-end flow. Test coverage target: 80%+ for services. Use Jest testing framework with @nestjs/testing module.
tests.locations: Unit tests: src/modules/mail/__tests__/services/template.service.spec.ts Integration tests: test/integration/mail-template.e2e-spec.ts (if created) Existing test pattern: src/modules/mail/__tests__/providers/sendgrid.provider.spec.ts, src/modules/mail/__tests__/services/mail.service.spec.ts

ideas.test: Unit test TemplateService.render() → Loads template file from templates directory, compiles template on first call (cache miss), uses cached compiled template on subsequent calls (cache hit), renders template with data variables correctly, throws NotFoundException when template file not found, throws BadRequestException when template syntax invalid, handles missing template variables gracefully

Unit test MailService.sendTemplateEmail() → Calls TemplateService.render() with correct parameters, calls MailService.sendEmail() with rendered HTML, wraps template rendering errors and throws BadRequestException, delegates email sending errors to MailService error handling
Integration test template rendering → Real template files with sample data (verification.hbs, password-reset.hbs, welcome.hbs), verify template compiled only once and used multiple times (caching)
Integration test MailService.sendTemplateEmail() → End-to-end flow (template → render → send email via SendGridProvider)
E2E test template email sending → MailService.sendTemplateEmail() → SendGrid API → Email delivered with correct content, verify {{firstName}}, {{verificationLink}} replaced correctly in email
